title: Filtering/searching Updates
excerpt: It would be brilliant if the updates could be filter or split between automated updates and user updates.  Additionally filtering on attachments.  Finally if you could search the updates that would be amazing - Searching…

posts.author: GeorginaMonet1 (Georgina Monet)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be brilliant if the updates could be filter or split between automated updates and user updates. Additionally filtering on attachments. Finally if you could search the updates that would be amazing - Searching by words or @people

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @GeorginaMonet1 ,
There’ the Board Email Reports app that provides the following types of reports.

image2047×675 83.5 KB

On a board/project level:

  1. New and updated tasks
  2. Status updates
  3. Budget, Costs, Revenue changes
  4. Timeline and deadline overdue
  5. Time Tracking changes

On an item/task level:

  • Updates by a specific employee
  • Updates mentioning a specific employee
  • Updates containing attachments
  • Status updates
  • Last updates

You need the second set of automations that aggregates item updates over a specific period of time in the automation rule and sends the xls-report to any people you mention in the rule (no guest access needed!).
This is an example of a report that consolidates item updates by a specific person:

image1386×555 53 KB

The message in my inbox with xls-attachment where you can find updates details:

image395×499 21 KB

You can test the app and check if it works for you. I hope you’ll find it helpful. Also, our team can make custom automation for your case in terms of item updates, just reach out to us.
